name: Microsoft Defender Logging Disabled
description: Detects modification of the Windows Registry to disable Microsoft Defender's logging, allowing adversaries to evade detection.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the registry modification event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Registry Value Set (13).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that modified the registry key.

parameters.name: registry_key
parameters.description: The full path to the modified registry key, 'SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender/Operational\Enabled'.

parameters.name: registry_value_type
parameters.description: The type of data written to the registry value (expected to be 'REG_DWORD').

parameters.name: registry_value_data
parameters.description: The data written to the registry value, which should be '0' to indicate disabled logging.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that initiated the registry modification.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
